violations.text: Several food items in the Kitchen Reach-In Cooler were observed held at 47 to 54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food Items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023

The Kitchen Reach-In Cooler was not in good repair/properly adjusted at the time of inspection. The unit temperature setting was adjusted to a colder setting at the time of inspection. (Unit observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 38 degrees by the end of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023
